Excellent service from the staff

reviews.comment:
Hay cuatro surtidores y solo dos playeros que tienen que permanecer sosteniendo la manguera xq falla el automático.  Esto genera lentitud en el despacho y se forman larguísimas colas. Estuvimos 40 minutos para cargar nafta

(Translated by Google)
There are four pumps and only two attendants who have to stay holding the hose because the automatic system malfunctions. This causes slow service and very long lines. We waited 40 minutes to fill up.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNteHV6MzNRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Si no cargaron nafta y van hacía Bariloche, háganlo acá, más adelante solo hay estaciones bandera blanca no recomendables.

(Translated by Google)
If you haven't filled up with gas and are heading towards Bariloche, do it here; further on there are only white-flag stations that are not recommended.

reviewReply.comment: Gracias por su calificación y comentario

reviews.comment:
Inexplicable que tengan mas de 6 surtidores y en epoca de vacaciones solo habiliten 2 para cargar. Esto hace que la espera sea milenaria....

(Translated by Google)
It's inexplicable that they have more than six pumps, but only two are available for charging during the holiday season. This makes the wait feel like an eternity....
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtak9IdmV3EAE
